name: Manaksia Coated Metals & Industries Limited
summary: Manaksia Coated Metals & Industries Limited manufactures and sells metal and household products in India and internationally. The company offers color coated pre painted galvanized steel, aluminum-zinc steel, and aluminum coils; and color coated (pre-painted) steel and aluminum sheets, as well as manufacture ultramarine blue powder used for improving whiteness of clothes and white washing/painting of walls. It also provides carbon steel, low alloy steel, high alloy steel, manganese steel, heat resistant, and grey iron/cast iron castings, as well as S G iron products to petrochemical, oil, gas, power, mining, steel, cement, OEM, transport, and engineering industries. In addition, the company offers mosquito repellent coils, liquid vaporizers, incense, and paper cards, as well as aerosol for mosquitoes and other crawling insects; and pre-coated sheets. The company was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
